feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: PhD candidate in Applied Mathematics & AI at the University of Strasbourg, working on uncertainty-aware deep learning for medical image segmentation in radiotherapy.

entry.title: Data Science and Artificial Intelligence Workshop (May 2025)

link.title: Data Science and Artificial Intelligence Workshop (May 2025)

entry.content:
Presentation given at the Data Science and Artificial Intelligence Workshop held at ICube Laboratory, University of Strasbourg, on June 5th, 2025.

Workshop Materials

Below you can find the slides from my presentation.
entry.summary: Presentation at the Data Science and AI Workshop, ICube Laboratory, Strasbourg.
